title: 'Heaven Resort' Holiday Turns Into Nightmare: Man Drowns In Swimming Pool As Helpless Kid Watches In Rajkot | CCTV Footage
description: A man's holiday plan with his family turned into a nightmare as he drowned in a swimming pool at 'Heaven Resort' in Rajkot, Gujarat. A CCTV footage showed the man drowning as a helpless kid watched the horrific scene before him.
